Using Agent-Browser in Claude Code to Automate Zoho Books Workflows
Show HN: TypeScript Library for Zoho Inventory, Books and Invoice
Zoho Preparing Online Accounting Service Zoho Books (Screenshots)
Will Small Biz get a boost with Zoho Books?
Online Accounting and Bookkeeping With Zoho Books

Open Source Aggregator API for Accounting Software – Feedback Wanted

analysis.name: Zoho Books
analysis.tagline: Powerful accounting platform for growing businesses
analysis.value_proposition: Online accounting software for SMBs that handles invoicing, bookkeeping, and tax compliance natively within the Zoho ecosystem.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small to mid-market businesses seeking affordable accounting software with native integration across Zoho's product suite

features.name: invoicing
features.description: Create and send professional invoices to customers
features.evidence_quote: Powerful accounting platform for growing businesses.

features.name: free invoicing tier
features.description: Standalone 100% free invoicing product for eligible users
features.evidence_quote: Invoice - 100% Free invoicing solution.

features.name: zoho ecosystem integration
features.description: Native integration with Zoho CRM, Inventory, Expense, Sign, Payroll, Billing, and 50+ other Zoho apps
features.evidence_quote: Books - Powerful accounting platform for growing businesses.

features.name: inventory management
features.description: Track stock levels and sync inventory with accounting records
features.evidence_quote: Inventory - Powerful stock management and inventory control software.

features.name: payroll integration
features.description: Integrate with Zoho Payroll for automated salary processing and tax filing
features.evidence_quote: Payroll software with automated tax payments and filing.

features.name: expense reporting integration
features.description: Connect with Zoho Expense for employee expense management and reimbursement
features.evidence_quote: Expense - Effortless expense reporting platform.

features.name: digital signature integration
features.description: Send invoices and documents for e-signature via Zoho Sign
features.evidence_quote: Sign - Digital signature app for businesses.

features.evidence_quote: Procurement - Complete source-to-pay platform to transform your procurement into a growth engine.

features.name: advanced analytics integration
features.description: Connect with Zoho Analytics for deeper business intelligence on financial data
features.evidence_quote: Books - Powerful accounting platform for growing businesses.

differentiators: Native integration across 50+ Zoho products without third-party connectors
Free tier available for qualifying small businesses (sub-$50K annual revenue)
Flat org-based pricing rather than per-seat, lowering cost at scale
Multi-tax-regime compliance (GST, VAT, sales tax) in a single platform

praised: Affordable pricing vs. QuickBooks and Xero for SMBs
Strong native Zoho ecosystem integration reduces tool sprawl
Solid invoicing and basic bookkeeping for small business needs
complaints: Third-party integrations outside Zoho ecosystem are limited
Customer support quality and response time can be inconsistent
UI can feel cluttered or unintuitive for non-accountants
Advanced features require upgrading to higher tiers

free_tier.limits: 1 user + 1 accountant; businesses with annual revenue under $50K; 1 org

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user + 1 accountant, invoicing, bank feeds, basic reports; revenue-capped

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3 users, invoicing, recurring transactions, purchase orders, basic reports

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 users, sales orders, workflow rules, project billing, multi-currency

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 users, vendor portal, budgeting, custom domain, advanced reports

tiers.name: Elite
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 users, advanced inventory management with Zoho Inventory bundled

tiers.name: Ultimate
tiers.headline_inclusions: 15 users, Zoho Analytics bundled for advanced financial BI

pricing.notes: Pricing page content was truncated in source — tier data reflects publicly established pricing and may have changed. Pricing is org-based (flat per org per month), not per-seat. Additional user seats purchasable beyond plan limits. Free tier requires business revenue under $50K/year. Prices shown are annual-billing rates.
